prerequisites: A BoldSign account with API access included in your plan (API must be part of your plan to generate an API key).
A generated BoldSign API key to provide in the api_key field.
A start_date value defining the earliest date from which to sync records.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: BoldSign authenticates server-to-server requests with an API key passed in the X-API-KEY HTTP header. Generate the key from the BoldSign dashboard and supply it in the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Confirm API access on your plan
setupSteps.body: Sign in to BoldSign and make sure API is part of your plan, which is required before you can generate an API key.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: In the BoldSign app, open the API item in the left navigation pane and select API Key. Click Generate API Key, then in the dialog click Generate Token. Copy the newly generated key. BoldSign sends this key in the X-API-KEY request header.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the required api_key field. Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should pull data.
